info.title: MC-account
info.description:
Multi-Account System

This spec only includes interfaces annotated with @OpenApiPermission, i.e., the public OpenAPI subset exposed to end users/integrators and accessed via API Gateway using Access Key / Secret Key (AK/SK) signature authentication. It excludes backend Admin, internal Feign, and other non-exposed interfaces.

post.summary: Query Transaction Record Details by Transaction ID

post.description:
MLP account withdrawal: transfer from MLP account to fund account, then to trading account. Deducts principal first, then yield
Required Permission: TRADE

trackingId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the request

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

post.description:
MLP account deposit: transfer from trading account to fund account, then deposit into MLP account
Required Permission: TRADE

trackingId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the request

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

post.description:
Only supports demand products: pass product code and withdrawal amount, transfer from wealth to fund account then to spot. For term positions with multiple entries, use the 'Term Position Withdrawal' API and specify the position detail ID
Required Permission: TRADE

trackingId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the request

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

post.description:
Only supports term products: specify position detail ID (holding or matured; consistent with the current position API's positionId). Backend redeems the full principal + interest for that entry. Workflow is consistent with demand withdrawal
Required Permission: TRADE

trackingId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the request

positionId.description: Term position primary key ID (can be redeemed whether holding or matured; consistent with positionId returned by the current position API)

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

post.description:
Wealth account deposit: transfer from spot account to fund account, then deposit into wealth product
Required Permission: TRADE

trackingId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the request

get.description:
Query MLP yield rate and other parameters under the current request context business line. Logic is consistent with backend MlpConfigController#getConfig. Response uses OpenAPI-specific models.
Required Permission: READ

feeType is fixed as INTEREST_FEE/FUNDING_FEE, amounts are grouped and aggregated by positionId+dealTime

Get spot account position information

get.description:
Query the full list of enabled product configurations by type (Demand/Term), no pagination, sorted by base APY + excess reward APY descending. Only the type query parameter is required
Required Permission: READ

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

subscribedAmount.description: Subscribed amount: net retained subscription principal in the pool (consistent with fund pool cap verification: cumulative deposits - cumulative redemptions + cumulative interest redemptions)

fundPoolAmount.description: Pool cap: maximum fund pool (ac_finance_product_config.fund_pool_amount; null or ≤0 means no limit)

availableSubscriptionBalance.description: Available subscription balance: remaining depositable amount up to the pool cap; null when pool has no cap set

subscriptionStartTime.description: Subscription start time; if both start and end are null, no restriction applies

subscriptionEndTime.description: Subscription end time; if both start and end are null, no restriction applies

maxDepositAmount.description: Max subscription amount: per-user max deposit (ac_finance_product_config.max_deposit_amount; null or ≤0 means no limit)

get.description:
Paginated query of holding/matured positions based on context UID. Multiple demand product entries of the same product are aggregated into one row. Results sorted by product_code ascending, then currency ascending. positionAmount is the total position principal (excluding unsettled interest; see currentRewardAmount for interest). cumulativeRewardAmount is the historical settled interest total in the original currency for that product and currency, not converted to USDC. Returns empty page when not logged in or missing business line
Required Permission: READ

orderBy.description: Supports multi-field sorting, separated by commas

orderDirection.description: ASC for ascending / DESC for descending; separate multiple fields with commas

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

positionId.description: Position detail ID; null when multiple demand entries of the same product are aggregated

positionAmount.description: Principal of holding orders: for demand products with multiple entries, this is the sum of principal_balance; excludes unsettled interest and frozen amounts (see currentRewardAmount for interest)

baseAnnualRate.description: Base annual interest rate % (term/demand single entry takes position snapshot; demand summary takes product config)

rewardMinHoldingDays.description: Must hold continuously for (days) to enjoy the excess tier; may be null when no tier rules exist

eligibleRewardAmount.description: Order holding amount not less than: the position principal threshold required to enjoy the excess reward tier (product config reward_min_position; may be null when no excess tier exists)

currentRewardAmount.description: Current holding interest: total holding interest for this user, product, and currency in ac_user_finance_position. Unit is the product's asset currency (consistent with currency field), not converted to USDC

cumulativeRewardAmount.description: Historical total interest: sum of amount from successful INTEREST records in ac_finance_transaction for this user, product, and currency. Unit is the product's asset currency (consistent with currency field), not converted to USDC

status.description: Position status: Holding / Matured (for demand product summaries, if any entry is holding, the status is Holding)

subscribeTime.description: Term: subscription time for this position detail (ac_user_finance_position.create_time, when subscription was successfully recorded). Null for demand product summaries

eligibleRewardAmountDisplay.description: Reward position principal threshold display value

baseAnnualRateDisplay.description: Base annual interest rate display value

get.description:
Consistent with backend redemption details: main table ac_transaction_history (EARN_WITHDRAWAL), paginated by create_time. productCode, type, position associations etc. come from ac_finance_transaction (tx_id = transaction_id, WITHDRAW). Redemption amount and time are from the main transaction record amount and create_time
Required Permission: READ

orderBy.description: Supports multi-field sorting, separated by commas

orderDirection.description: ASC for ascending / DESC for descending; separate multiple fields with commas

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

redeemAmount.description: Current redemption amount: absolute value of main transaction record ac_transaction_history.amount (consistent with backend redemption details)

endTime.description: Current redemption time: main transaction record ac_transaction_history.create_time (consistent with backend redemption detail redeemTime)

expireTime.description: Associated position expiry date: ac_user_finance_position.end_time; null when no associated position

expireTimeTimestamp.description: Associated position expiry date millisecond timestamp

get.description:
Returns products by product dimension, sorted by product_code ascending then currency ascending. User-side userDepositedAmount/userInterestAmount/availableBalance come from the position summary of that product in ac_user_finance_position (in the product's currency). totalDepositValue is the sum of each product's position principal × oracle price converted to USDC. totalInterestValue and yesterdayInterestValue are still interest settlement records converted to USDC by currency. userSpotAvailableBalance is at the spot currency dimension, same value for products of the same currency. All user-side values are 0 when not logged in
Required Permission: READ

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

totalDepositValue.description: User total deposit (principal per currency × corresponding oracle price, converted to USDC; 0 when not logged in)

totalInterestValue.description: User historical settled interest total (ac_finance_transaction successful INTEREST records aggregated by currency, amount × oracle price, converted to USDC. Calculation consistent with totalDepositValue and yesterdayInterestValue: decimal places = FinanceConstants.DECIMAL_SCALE, ROUND_DOWN; 0 when not logged in)

yesterdayInterestValue.description: Yesterday's interest (settled interest records from the previous calendar day in Asia/Shanghai timezone, converted to USDC using the same oracle; 0 when not logged in)

products.description: By product dimension: each entry corresponds to ac_finance_product + configuration. User amounts come from position summaries under that product, platform fields come from product summary tables. Includes subscribedAmount, fundPoolAmount, availableSubscriptionBalance (consistent with wealth product catalog)

maxDepositAmount.description: Per-user subscription cap (per-user max deposit; null or ≤0 means no limit)

dailyMaxRedeemAmount.description: Daily redemption limit (null or ≤0 means no limit)

pauseRedeem.description: Whether redemption is suspended (true means suspended, redemption cannot be initiated)

rewardAnnualRate.description: Reward annual rate: excess reward tier APY% (config excess_reward_annual_rate)

subscriptionStartTime.description: Subscription start time; if both start and end are null, no restriction applies

subscriptionEndTime.description: Subscription end time; if both start and end are null, no restriction applies

rewardMinHoldingDays.description: Order holding days: must hold continuously for (days) to qualify for the excess reward tier (reward_min_holding_days)

rewardMinPosition.description: Order holding amount not less than: must satisfy together with holding days for tiered interest calculation (reward_min_position)

userDepositedAmount.description: Total position principal for the current user under this product (ac_user_finance_position.principal_balance, holding + matured; 0 when not logged in)

userInterestAmount.description: Total unsettled interest for the current user under this product (ac_user_finance_position.interest_balance; 0 when not logged in)

availableBalance.description: Total book value for the current user under this product: principal + interest + frozen (ac_user_finance_position; 0 when not logged in)

userSpotAvailableBalance.description: Spot available balance for the current user in this currency (independent of product; same value returned for all products of the same currency; 0 when not logged in)

totalDeposited.description: Platform's cumulative deposits for this product (ac_finance_product.total_deposited)

totalPrincipal.description: Platform's current retained principal for this product (ac_finance_product: total_deposited - total_withdrawn + total_interest_withdrawn)

subscribedAmount.description: Subscribed amount: net retained subscription principal in the pool (consistent with fund pool cap verification: cumulative deposits - cumulative redemptions + cumulative interest redemptions)

fundPoolAmount.description: Pool cap: maximum fund pool (ac_finance_product_config.fund_pool_amount; null or ≤0 means no limit)

availableSubscriptionBalance.description: Available subscription balance: remaining depositable amount up to the pool cap; null when pool has no cap set

rewardMinPositionDisplay.description: Order holding amount threshold display value

userDepositedAmountDisplay.description: User position principal total display value

userInterestAmountDisplay.description: User unsettled interest total display value

userSpotAvailableBalanceDisplay.description: User spot available balance display value

availableBalanceDisplay.description: User position book value total display value

totalPrincipalDisplay.description: Platform current retained principal display value

totalInterestValueDisplay.description: User historical settled interest total display value

If exchanging USDT for BTC, then from is USDT and to is BTC
Required Permission: READ

userSpotAvailableBalance.description: Spot available balance for the current user in this currency (independent of product; same value returned for all products of the same currency; 0 when not logged in)

totalDeposited.description: Platform's cumulative deposits for this product (ac_finance_product.total_deposited)

totalPrincipal.description: Platform's current retained principal for this product (ac_finance_product: total_deposited - total_withdrawn + total_interest_withdrawn)

subscribedAmount.description: Subscribed amount: net retained subscription principal in the pool (consistent with fund pool cap verification: cumulative deposits - cumulative redemptions + cumulative interest redemptions)

fundPoolAmount.description: Pool cap: maximum fund pool (ac_finance_product_config.fund_pool_amount; null or ≤0 means no limit)

availableSubscriptionBalance.description: Available subscription balance: remaining depositable amount up to the pool cap; null when pool has no cap set

rewardMinPositionDisplay.description: Order holding amount threshold display value

userDepositedAmountDisplay.description: User position principal total display value

userInterestAmountDisplay.description: User unsettled interest total display value

userSpotAvailableBalanceDisplay.description: User spot available balance display value

availableBalanceDisplay.description: User position book value total display value

totalPrincipalDisplay.description: Platform current retained principal display value

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.
Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.
Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

BookPriceDot.description: Quotes from the exchange rate conversion process - includes multiple conversion steps, key=currency pair (Warning: only available in non-production environments, used for testing exchange rate accuracy)

oneFromToQuantity.description: Quantity of [to] currency exchangeable for 1 [from] currency

oneToFromQuantity.description: Quantity of [from] currency exchangeable for 1 [to] currency

bookPriceDotMap.description: Quotes from the exchange rate conversion process - includes multiple conversion steps, key=currency pair (Warning: only available in non-production environments, used for testing exchange rate accuracy)

baseExchangeRate.description: Base exchange rate (before fee deduction / free quota application), used for testing verification

fromAmountDisplay.description: User-input source currency amount display value

fromAmountScale.description: User-input source currency amount display precision

freeQuotaFromAmount.description: Today's remaining free quota (from amount, used for calculating fee-free tier)

freeQuotaFromAmountDisplay.description: Today's remaining free quota (from amount) display value

feeAmountDisplay.description: Actual fee charged (from amount) display value

feeAmountScale.description: Actual fee charged (from amount) display precision

netFromAmount.description: Net amount actually used in exchange (from amount) = fromAmount - feeAmount

netFromAmountDisplay.description: Net amount actually used in exchange (from amount) display value

toAmountDisplay.description: Expected received amount (to amount) display value

toAmountScale.description: Expected received amount (to amount) display precision

convertFeePercent.description: Flash exchange fee percentage (deducted from the source amount)

dailyFreeConvertFeeQuotaUsd.description: Daily free flash exchange fee quota (USDC equivalent, accumulated per user, reset at UTC+8 daily cutover)

dailyRemainingFreeConvertFeeQuotaUsd.description: Today's remaining free flash exchange fee quota (USDC equivalent, accumulated per user, reset at UTC+8 daily cutover)

dailyRemainingFreeConvertFeeQuotaUsdDisp.description: Today's remaining free flash exchange fee quota (USDC equivalent) display value

codeKey.description: Business error key (ExceptionTypeEnum name). Full list: /api-reference/error-codes.

orderBy.title: Sort field
orderBy.description: Supports multi-field sorting, separated by commas

orderDirection.title: Sort direction
orderDirection.description: ASC for ascending / DESC for descending; separate multiple fields with commas

enum: EnDealActionEnum{id=6, description='Bonus. This operation type affects the client's credit assets'}
EnDealActionEnum{id=16, description='Tax-exempt (non-taxable) dividend operation (tax paid by company, not client)'}
EnDealActionEnum{id=19, description='Related to forced liquidation event'}

commissionDisplay.description: Fee display value, rounded up with sign, fixed to 6 decimal places

profitDisplay.description: P/L display value, rounded and fixed to 6 decimal places

McAccessKey.description: Access Key (AK), created by the user in API Key Management
McAccessKey.name: X-Access-Key

McSignature.description: HMAC-SHA256 Signature v2 (Base64). See the Authentication Getting Started documentation for algorithm and signing string details
McSignature.name: X-Signature

McTimestamp.description: Current Unix timestamp in milliseconds (13 digits). Must be within ±10 minutes of server time
McTimestamp.name: X-Timestamp

McNonce.description: Unique nonce per request (UUID v4 recommended), used for anti-replay; participates in signature v2
McNonce.name: X-Nonce
